description: Canonical UTU constants for authoring and governance. Source of truth: docs/specs/utu-architecture.md

protocols.name: Transmission
protocols.cognitiveRole: Schema acquisition: high-fidelity data loading and modeling
protocols.failureMode: Passive Familiarity Illusion: recognition without ability to act

protocols.name: Guided Construction
protocols.cognitiveRole: Conceptual restructuring: merging new data with existing schema
protocols.failureMode: Cognitive Flailing: inquiry without stable P1 buffer

protocols.name: Apprenticeship
protocols.cognitiveRole: Proceduralization: hard-coding the model into a fluid skill

protocols.name: Dev. Sequencing
protocols.cognitiveRole: Stabilization: matching task complexity to biological bandwidth

protocols.name: Meaning Activation
protocols.cognitiveRole: Transfer: deploying the skill in high-stakes, authentic context
protocols.failureMode: Activity without Rigor: high engagement, zero structural output

items.description: Quantification: composition, decomposition, conservation of quantity
Transformation: how actions change states while preserving structure
Relation & Structure: meaning as a function of connections/constraints
Representation: translation between external encodings (symbols/tools)
Invariance & Equivalence: what survives change (congruence)
Composition/Decomposition: complexity as structured assembly
Uncertainty & Variation: quantifiable structure within non-fixed outcomes
Justification & Generalization: the study of necessity and proof
System Observation: disciplined noticing as root of knowledge
Pattern Detection: moving from event to expectation via repetition
Model Construction: imagining mechanisms to explain the unseen
Testing & Intervention: strengthening knowledge through interaction
Scale Navigation: relating micro-phenomena to macro-consequences
Uncertainty Management: quantifying reliability and known-ness of claims
Knowledge Revision: self-correction and being "less wrong"
Collective Organization: solving coordination via roles and norms
Resource Exchange: negotiated allocation of value and scarcity
Authority & Legitimacy: justification and contestation of power
Cultural Expression: meaning systems that stabilize group identity
Historical Continuity: reconstructing the past to guide action
Human–Environment Interaction: co-evolution of culture and landscape
Perspective Taking: social truth is multi-voiced

bands.phase: Operational/Structural: procedural mastery moving to abstract relations
Operational/Structural: procedural mastery moving to abstract relations
Hypothetical/Formal: systemic modeling and epistemic validation
Hypothetical/Formal: systemic modeling and epistemic validation
